log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!

REASONING: Throwing rock at Dhampir — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:11+9=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Dhampir — Bardic Musician HP: 43/67
--- Dhampir — Bardic Musician --- HP: 43/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:11+3=14 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 133/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Dhampir — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Dhampir — Bardic Musician HP: 24/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Dhampir — Bardic Musician.
